index.drop: Drop a video file (optionally with .srt/.vtt/.ass), or
index.noVideo: No video file in the drop

library.title: Recent videos
library.renameDesc: Leave empty to restore the original filename.

companion.title: Companion subtitles detected
companion.body: Found a subtitle file alongside the video:

player.suspectTitle: Whisper marked these chunks as low confidence
player.suspectCueTitle: Transcription quality may be off (retried 2 times)

errors.disconnected: Lost connection to the translation service. Make sure Ollama is running.
errors.FATAL_UNKNOWN: Translation failed unexpectedly. Please try again.
errors.TASK_NOT_FOUND: This translation task has expired. Try switching the language again.

player.cancelTranslationDesc: Cues translated so far will be kept. You can resume by switching to this language again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Per-user preferences and on-disk cache management.
settings.whisperHint: Bigger = more accurate but slower. Changes apply to new transcribe tasks.
settings.ollamaHint: Use the exact tag visible in `ollama list`. Recommended: {model}.
settings.silenceHint: Inter-cue gaps ≥ this duration get a 「── no audio ──」divider in the cue list.
settings.cueFontSizeHint: Affects only the subtitle list panel; video subtitles are configured in the player.
settings.debugDescription: Keep raw paths and filenames in JSONL logs.
settings.debugMode: Debug mode (keep raw paths/filenames in JSONL logs)

cache.title: Cache
cache.noVideosDesc: Drag a video into the home page and it will appear here.
cache.deleteOneDesc: {name} and its cached subtitles will be removed. This cannot be undone.
cache.clearAllDesc: This will delete every cached video and subtitle file. This action cannot be undone.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.body: ZIP with sanitized JSONL logs (last 7d), settings, hardware info, installed models. No video content or cue text.
